//: apps/studio's OWN tsconfig. The root tsconfig.json deliberately never references this (no `references`, and its `include` names no apps/ path), so the backend's `tsc -p tsconfig.json` never sees this app's JSX (ADR-006 isolation invariant, ADR-007 §3).
//paths: The canonical s1<->SPA contract is the `@deepnote/runtime-server/types` subpath (ADR-007 §6). The SPA consumes it TYPE-ONLY (`import type`) and derives every view-model from it, never re-declaring a project shape — so a contract change is a compile error, not silent drift. The `paths` aliases below resolve that type (and its transitive `@deepnote/*` type deps) from package SOURCE, so the studio typecheck + DOM-env vitest suite work in a worktree without first building the backend's dist. They are TYPE-only edges: the isolation test still forbids importing the bare `@deepnote/runtime-server` runtime entry or any `node:` builtin.
